{{Quote|The Confederacy is moving a lot of their planning and staging areas to ''Alliga,'' in the Outer Rim. The leaders have taken refuge out there.|[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|<ref name="Republic 71">[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]</ref>}}
'''Alliga''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Phelleem sector/Legends|Phelleem sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Holwuff/Legends|Holwuff]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. As the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] began to threaten galactic unity, Senator Wodrata pledged loyalty to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] at [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], days before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A member of the [[Separatist Council/Legends|Separatist Council]], Wodrata allowed [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]] to use Alliga as a staging area for the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. Shortly before the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]], Alliga was host to the Separatist Council as they plotted their war games. When the Confederacy was defeated and the Council executed on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], the world was turned over to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />
